cover_caption: Figure 2: Method Overview. SimFoundry extracts per-object relevant information (segmentation masks, depth, etc.), generates 3D visual meshes via 2D-to-3D generation models, and compiles the final output scene by annotating relevant physical parameters and sanity checking the overall scene configuration in a physics simulator. SimFoundry additionally supports diverse simulated augmentations along these axes of variation on object, scene, and task: object cousins can be generated by modifying input objects in their image space and re-generating corresponding 3D meshes; scene cousins can augment the configuration of objects; and task cousins can propose viable interactions within the scene.
source_title: SimFoundry: Modular and Automated Scene Generation for Policy Learning and Evaluation

source_authors_full.name: Tianyuan Dai
source_authors_full.affiliation: NVIDIA; The University of Texas at Austin

source_authors_full.name: Yuke Zhu
source_authors_full.affiliation: NVIDIA; The University of Texas at Austin

figures.caption: Figure 2: Method Overview. SimFoundry extracts per-object relevant information (segmentation masks, depth, etc.), generates 3D visual meshes via 2D-to-3D generation models, and compiles the final output scene by annotating relevant physical parameters and sanity checking the overall scene configuration in a physics simulator. SimFoundry additionally supports diverse simulated augmentations along these axes of variation on object, scene, and task: object cousins can be generated by modifying input objects in their image space and re-generating corresponding 3D meshes; scene cousins can augment the configuration of objects; and task cousins can propose viable interactions within the scene.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 2: 방법 개요. SimFoundry는 객체별 관련 정보(분할 마스크, 깊이 등)를 추출하고, 2D-to-3D 생성 모델로 3D 시각 메시를 만든 뒤, 관련 물리 파라미터를 주석화하고 물리 시뮬레이터에서 전체 장면 구성을 검증해 최종 장면을 조립한다. 또한 객체·장면·태스크의 세 변화 축을 지원한다. 객체 cousin은 입력 객체를 이미지 공간에서 수정하고 대응하는 3D 메시를 다시 생성하며, 장면 cousin은 객체 배치를 증강하고, 태스크 cousin은 장면 안에서 가능한 상호작용을 제안한다.

figures.caption: Figure 4: Tasks and Real-to-Sim Policy Evaluation correlations. (Left) We apply SimFoundry to a DROID setup using a single Franka arm (top two rows), and a bimanual setup with two YAM arms (bottom row). Our tasks span multiple types of manipulation, including multi-step, articulated object interaction, and bimanual coordination (Clear Table not shown, more details in Appendix I). (Right) Under zero-shot policy evaluation without simulator-specific finetuning, SimFoundry outperforms the state-of-the-art baseline PolaRiS [32] in simulation-based evaluation correlations. Each marker shape represents a different task from the left. Additional details in Appendix G and Figure G.1.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 4: 태스크와 real-to-sim 정책 평가 상관관계. (왼쪽) 위 두 행은 단일 Franka 팔을 쓰는 DROID 구성이고, 아래 행은 두 YAM 팔을 쓰는 양팔 구성이다. 태스크는 multi-step 조작, 관절형 객체 상호작용, 양팔 협응을 포함한다(Clear Table은 생략, Appendix I 참조). (오른쪽) 시뮬레이터 전용 미세조정 없이 수행한 zero-shot 정책 평가에서 SimFoundry는 시뮬레이션 기반 평가 상관관계가 최신 baseline PolaRiS [32]보다 높다. 각 마커 모양은 왼쪽의 서로 다른 태스크를 나타낸다. 자세한 내용은 Appendix G와 Figure G.1에 있다.

figures.caption: Figure 5: SimFoundry Data Diversity Improves Policy Performance. (A) Across multiple robot embodiments and multiple tasks, leveraging additional object cousins [17] improves direct Sim-to-Real policy transfer on the original target scene objects and additional held-out unseen objects. (B) Scene cousins improve policy performance on the original scene and allow policy transfer to cousin scenes. (C) Adding task cousins improves performance on related downstream tasks by enabling intra-task transfer. Note: Pot refers to the Pot on Stove task, Trash refers to the Throw Away Trash task and Marker is for the Store Marker task.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 5: SimFoundry 데이터 다양성이 정책 성능을 높인다. (A) 여러 로봇 embodiment와 태스크에서 추가 object cousin [17]을 활용하면 원래 목표 장면의 객체와 별도로 보류한 미관측 객체 모두에서 직접 sim-to-real 정책 전이가 개선된다. (B) Scene cousin은 원래 장면에서의 정책 성능을 높이고 cousin 장면으로의 정책 전이를 가능하게 한다. (C) Task cousin을 추가하면 intra-task transfer를 통해 관련 downstream 태스크 성능이 향상된다. Pot은 Pot on Stove, Trash는 Throw Away Trash, Marker는 Store Marker 태스크를 뜻한다.

tables.caption: Table 1: System comparison. SimFoundry provides a unified and modular pipeline for real-to-sim scene generation that is more feature complete than prior works.
tables.caption_ko: Table 1: 시스템 비교. SimFoundry는 이전 연구보다 기능 구성이 더 완전한 통합형·모듈형 real-to-sim 장면 생성 파이프라인을 제공한다.

tables.caption: Table 2: Multi-task policy evaluation. Success rates for policies evaluated on seen and held-out tasks in simulation and the real world.
tables.caption_ko: Table 2: Multi-task 정책 평가. 시뮬레이션과 실제 세계의 관측 태스크 및 held-out 태스크에서 평가한 정책 성공률.

relations.note: Both use reconstructed simulation to scale manipulation data and transfer policies to the real world; RoboPaint retargets human demonstrations across embodiments and views, while SimFoundry reconstructs interactive scenes and diversifies objects, layouts, and tasks.
Both target reliable zero-shot sim-to-real transfer, but SimFoundry focuses on manipulation scene generation and policy evaluation while PACE focuses on identified legged-robot dynamics.
Both scale robot learning in simulation for zero-shot hardware deployment, with different task domains and approaches to closing the simulation gap.

ai_summary.one_liner: SimFoundry turns one real-world video into an interactive digital twin, expands it into object, scene, and task cousins, and uses the resulting simulations for both predictive policy evaluation and zero-shot sim-to-real training.
ai_summary.problem: Real-world robot policy training and evaluation are expensive, while prior real-to-sim systems often automate only scene reconstruction, policy evaluation, or sim-to-real training rather than closing the full loop for complex manipulation.
ai_summary.solution: A modular Extraction-Generation-Augmentation pipeline decomposes a video into RGB-D objects, generates and aligns sim-ready articulated meshes with physical properties, stabilizes the scene, and produces affordance-preserving object, scene, and task cousins for evaluation and data generation.
ai_summary.key_result: Across 7 tasks and 5 policy architectures, simulation evaluation reaches mean Pearson correlation 0.911 and MMRV 0.018; object, scene, and task cousins improve average zero-shot real-world task success by 17%, 21%, and 40%, respectively.
limitations: The pipeline inherits non-determinism and failure modes from remote VLM, inpainting, depth, segmentation, and image-to-mesh components.
Physics stabilization assumes a single flat support surface, restricting current use to tabletop-style layouts.
Automatic 3DGS background reconstruction requires roughly 90 minutes per scene on one GPU and may introduce inpainting or near-field artifacts.
Evidence is concentrated on seven manipulation tasks across DROID and YAM, so broader transfer to mobile, non-planar, and contact-diverse environments remains unverified.

research_gaps.question: How can automated real-to-sim pipelines support multi-level, non-planar, and mobile-manipulation environments without assuming a single tabletop support plane?
How can foundation-model scene generation become deterministic and uncertainty-aware enough for reproducible policy evaluation?
Do simulation-to-reality correlations and cousin-driven gains persist across mobile manipulation, deformable objects, and contact regimes beyond DROID and YAM tabletop tasks?

future_directions: Replace the single-plane stability assumption with hierarchical support and contact reasoning for multi-level and non-planar scenes.
Add uncertainty estimates and deterministic caching around VLM, inpainting, depth, segmentation, and mesh-generation modules.
Reduce automatic background reconstruction latency and improve near-field 3DGS rendering for robot-mounted cameras.
Validate cousin generation and zero-shot evaluation on mobile manipulation, deformable objects, and additional robot embodiments.
